title: List Backups for Restore on Mittwald
description: Review available backups on Mittwald for potential restore.
prompt: Something went wrong with our last deployment and the site is broken. Can you show me the available backups for the project and help me restore from yesterday's backup? I need to get the site working again ASAP. Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.

questionAnswers.answer: Yesterday's backup, the most recent one before today
